problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area may resolve Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
